title: Lost in a Foreign City
content: While exploring Prague, Noah accidentally took the wrong tram and ended up in an unfamiliar neighborhood far from the city center. His phone battery was almost empty, and he could not access his map application. For a moment, he felt genuinely worried. Instead of panicking, Noah entered a small café and asked for assistance. The owner spoke enough English to explain how to return to the central station. Although getting lost was stressful, the experience reminded him that unexpected situations often become memorable travel stories later.
